body.zh-TW: 管理員擁有所有貢獻者能力，並可以直接寫入節點和邊，繞過審核隊列。他們可以批准或拒絕貢獻者的提案、更改成員角色、移除成員、創建邀請連結、啟動工作區軟刪除以及取消待處理的刪除。
body.en: Admins have all contributor capabilities and can directly write to nodes and edges, bypassing the review queue. They can approve or reject contributor proposals, change member roles, remove members, create invite links, initiate workspace soft-deletion, and cancel pending deletions.
